name: namokara-suite
description: Multi-tenant B2B SaaS platform — Trading, Accounting, Suppliers, HR. Built by Anjaninex.
author: Anjaninex

scripts.reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && dotnet ef database update
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces && cd apps/api && dotnet test
scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces && cd apps/api && dotnet publish -c Release
